# Build index lists and normalized versions
import re, unicodedata, math, difflib
def strip_diacritics(s):
    # remove Arabic diacritics
    diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06ED]')
    s = diacritics.sub('', s)
    return ''.join(ch for ch in s if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return None
    s = s.replace('\u0640', '')  # tatweel
    # unify alif variants
    s = re.sub('[\u0622\u0623\u0625\u0671]', '\u0627', s)  # آ أ إ ٱ -> ا
    # unify hamza forms to ء
    s = s.replace('ؤ','ء').replace('ئ','ء').replace('ٶ','ء').replace('ٸ','ء').replace('ء','ء')
    # map taa marbuta to ه
    s = s.replace('ة','ه')
    # map alif maqsura to ya
    s = s.replace('ى', 'ي')
    # remove diacritics
    s = strip_diacritics(s)
    # remove punctuation (Arabic and English)
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s\u0600-\u06FF]', ' ', s)
    # collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip()
    return s

# Prepare hadith data list of texts
hadith_texts = []
for i, h in enumerate(hadith_data):
    # prefer hadithTxt or Matn; both may exist
    txt = h.get('hadithTxt') or h.get('Matn')
    matn = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt')
    hadith_texts.append({
        'i': i,
        'hadithID': h.get('hadithID'),
        'BookID': h.get('BookID'),
        'title': h.get('title'),
        'hadithTxt': h.get('hadithTxt'),
        'Matn': h.get('Matn'),
        'text': txt,
        'norm': normalize_arabic(txt) if txt else None
    })

len(hadith_texts), sum(1 for x in hadith_texts if x['text'] is None)
